name: claude-code-handoff
description: Delegate Codex reviews, investigations, and bounded implementation tasks to the local Claude Code CLI through auditable files.

interface.shortDescription: Hand Codex work to local Claude Code
interface.longDescription: Claude Code Handoff lets Codex delegate read-only reviews, investigations, second opinions, test planning, documentation checks, and bounded write-mode subtasks to the local Claude Code CLI. Results are returned through result.json, metadata files, and git diff rather than shared chat context.
defaultPrompt: Ask Claude Code to review my current diff
Get a second opinion from Claude Code
